title: Use of certificates
doc_html:
§3247.  Use of certificates

The commissioner by rule may provide that persons who hold more restrictive certificates may use those certificates in lieu of less restrictive certificates.

Added by Acts 1982, No. 198, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1983.
doc_text:
§3247.  Use of certificates
The commissioner by rule may provide that persons who hold more restrictive certificates may use those certificates in lieu of less restrictive certificates.
Added by Acts 1982, No. 198, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1983.
